untranslatable_reason: Signal requires direct measurement of trader bullishness sentiment (80% of traders bullish) and contract ratio analysis (1/4 buyer vs seller contracts). These are not market price/technical indicators but rather sentiment/positioning metrics not available in the allowed indicator set. The india_vix proxy is an approximation only.
translation_notes: The original signal references Hadady's bullishness formula and contract ratio analysis, which are sentiment/positioning indicators requiring trader polling data or COT-style positioning data not in the allowed indicator list. Used india_vix as a loose proxy for market fear/bullishness extremes, but this does not accurately capture the specific 80% bullish threshold or the buyer/seller contract ratio mechanism described in the signal. A proper implementation would require access to sentiment indices or positioning data.
